О•ОҜОҪОұО№ ОҪПҢПғП„О№ОјОҝ ОәОұО№ ОҫОӯПҒПү ПҢП„О№ Оҝ ОәОұОёОӯОҪОұПӮ О»ОұП„ПҒОөПҚОөО№ П„ОӯП„ОҝО№Оұ ОәОӯО№Оә ОіО№ОұП„ОҜ ОөОҜОҪОұО№ ОәПҒОөОјПҺОҙОөПӮ ОәОұО№ ОӯПҮОөО№ ОіОөПҚПғО· ПғОұОҪ ПҖОұОіПүП„ПҢ.

de.title: Kuchen besser als Eis und in 15 Minuten fertig / Schneller Plasmakuchen in 15 Minuten
de.description:
Ein Kuchen in 15 Minuten Kekse und Obst fГјr ГңberraschungsgГӨste oder wenn Sie es eilig haben. Es ist kГ¶stlich und ich weiГҹ, dass jeder solche Kuchen liebt, weil sie cremig sind und nach Eis schmecken.


ZUTATEN
500 ml sГјГҹ-saure Sahne
400 g saure Sahne
130-150 g Puderzucker
400 g gemahlene Kekse
100 g Kokosnuss
400 g gefrorene Himbeeren oder gefrorene FrГјchte (WaldfrГјchte, Erdbeeren oder Brombeeren)

Zur Dekoration
3 Beutel Schlagsahne von 100 gr
300 ml kalte Milch

Ciasto w 15 minut z herbatnikami i owocami na niespodziankДҷ dla goЕӣci lub gdy siДҷ spieszysz. Jest przepyszny i wiem, Ејe kaЕјdy kocha takie ciasta, bo jest kremowy i smakuje jak lody.


SKЕҒADNIKI
500 ml sЕӮodkiej Еӣmietany
400 g Еӣmietany
130-150 g cukru pudru
400 g mielonych herbatnikГіw
100 g kokosa
400 g mroЕјonych malin lub mroЕјonych owocГіw (owoce leЕӣne, truskawki lub jeЕјyny)

Do dekoracji
3 torebki bitej Еӣmietany po 100 gr
300 ml zimnego mleka

ro.title: PrДғjiturДғ mai bunДғ decГўt Г®ngheИӣata Иҷi gata Г®n 15 min / Tort rapid cu plasmДғ Г®n 15 min
ro.description:
Un tort Г®n 15 minute de biscuiИӣi Иҷi fructe pentru oaspeИӣii surprizДғ sau cГўnd vДғ grДғbiИӣi. Este delicios Иҷi Иҷtiu cДғ toatДғ lumea iubeИҷte astfel de prДғjituri, deoarece este cremoasДғ Иҷi are gust de Г®ngheИӣatДғ.


INGREDIENTE
500 ml smГўntГўnДғ dulce
400 g smГўntГўnДғ
130-150 g zahДғr pudrДғ
400 g de biscuiИӣi mДғcinaИӣi
100 g nucДғ de cocos
400 g de zmeurДғ congelatДғ sau fructe congelate (fructe de pДғdure, cДғpИҷuni sau mure)

Pentru decorare
3 pungi de frisca de 100 gr

it.title: Torta migliore del gelato e pronta in 15 min / Torta al plasma veloce in 15 min
it.description:
Una torta in 15 minuti di biscotti e frutta per gli ospiti a sorpresa o quando si ha fretta. ГҲ delizioso e so che tutti amano queste torte perchГ© sono cremose e sanno di gelato.


INGREDIENTI
500 ml di panna acida
400 g di panna acida
130-150 g di zucchero a velo
400 g di biscotti macinati
100 g di cocco
400 g di lamponi congelati o frutta congelata (frutti di bosco, fragole o more)

Per la decorazione
3 sacchetti di panna montata da 100 gr
300 ml di latte freddo
#cake #ricette

fr.description:
Un gГўteau en 15 minutes de biscuits et de fruits pour les invitГ©s surprises ou lorsque vous ГӘtes pressГ©. C'est dГ©licieux et je sais que tout le monde aime ces gГўteaux car ils sont crГ©meux et ont le goГ»t de la glace.


INGRГүDIENTS
500 ml de crГЁme sure douce
400 g de crГЁme sure
130-150 g de sucre en poudre
400 g de biscuits moulus
100 g de noix de coco
400 g de framboises surgelГ©es ou de fruits surgelГ©s (fruits des bois, fraises ou mГ»res)

Pour la dГ©coration
3 sachets de chantilly de 100 gr

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Goran Е ariДҮ - Tajne Hristovog groba i zabranjena Biblijska uДҚenja otkrivena! (2.5.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bio je Goran Е ariДҮ, katoliДҚki istoriДҚar i teolog. Postao je poznat nakon ЕЎto je u medijima izneo niz tvrdnji po kojima su Srbi potomci Ilira starosedelaca Balkana, a da se moЕҫe pratiti veza stanovnika Lepenskog vira i VinДҚe sa danaЕЎnjim stanovnicima Srbije i Balkana. On je, kao ЕЎto tvrde i brojni istoriДҚari u Srbiji, objasnio da su Austrija i NemaДҚka manipulisali istorijom kako bi Slovene pokazali kao doseljenike na Balkan i u tome naЕЎli opravdanje za kolonizaciju ovog prostora od strane Germana. Goran Е ariДҮ odgovara na kljuДҚna pitanja na temelju dugogodiЕЎnjih istraЕҫivanja arhiva od Vatikana, preko BeДҚa i Dubrovnika. NaЕЎu proЕЎlost, sadaЕЎnjost i buduДҮnost rekonstruiЕЎe pomoДҮu nekoliko stotina razliДҚitih izvora i koristeДҮi preko 20 nauДҚnih disciplina u analizi. PreporuДҚujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate viЕЎe o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 29.04.2021. godine u naЕЎim prostorijama, u Beogradu. Emisiju je vodio novinar Nemanja BlagojeviДҮ.

*************************************************************

Ako bismo prestali da budemo zavisni od korporacija koji kontroliЕЎu druЕЎtvene mreЕҫe, lakЕЎe bismo mogli da ЕЎirimo slobodnu reДҚ i naЕЎe emisije bi imale mnogo veДҮi domet.

Kako zajedno moЕҫemo da pobedimo u borbi za istinu? Instalirajte aplikaciju Telegram i pridruЕҫite nam se na https://t.me/tvbalkaninfo

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i Еҫele da pomognu rad naЕЎe produkcije to mogu uДҚiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. TrudiДҮemo se da ostanemo dosledni naЕЎoj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i ЕЎirenju istine bez cenzure.

PAYPAL - Donacije za naЕЎu produkciju
https://www.paypal.me/tvbalkaninfo/

PATREON - Donacije za naЕЎu produkciju
https://www.patreon.com/tvbalkaninfo/

BALKAN INFO - Druge moguДҮnosti za donacije
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/donacije/

*************************************************************

Rad naЕЎe produkcije moЕҫete podrЕҫati kupovinom majica, dukserica, ЕЎolja i drugih proizvoda koji uz moderan i elegantan dizajn promoviЕЎu vrednosti za koje se svi zajedno borimo.

BALKAN INFO - ZvaniДҚna online prodavnica
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/prodavnica/

TEESPRING - Online prodavnica (samo za inostranstvo)
https://teespring.com/stores/tvbalkaninfo/

*************************************************************

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne Еҫele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji poЕЎtuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji ДҚuvaju seДҮanje na naЕЎe slavne pretke.

snippet.title: Praznik rada slavi s plugom u rukama
snippet.description:
Svi koji Еҫele pomoДҮi porodici Ibre SmajiДҮa mogu ga kontaktirati na telefon: 061 875 357 Adresa: selo Bukve b.b , 72250 Vitez, BiH
PridruЕҫite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join
Ibrahim SmajiДҮ iz Viteza meД‘unarodni praznik rada doДҚekuje na njivi s plugom u rukama i upregnutim konjem. On je joЕЎ uvijek radnik bez plaДҮe, penzije, ikakvih primanja. Samo ono ЕЎto zaradi s konjem to i ima. Pored toga ima i bolesnog punoljetnog sina koji je invalid. Na pitanje  zaЕЎto radi na meД‘unarodni praznik rada, Ibro je odgovorio: "Pa zar nije praznik rada, treba se raditi a ne odmarati. Ibro zahvaljuje dijaspori koja ga je kako kaЕҫe ostavila na Еҫivotu. ViЕЎe pogledajte u video priДҚi.

snippet.title: BEZ USTRUДҢAVANJA - Toma Fila: Ubio bih Palmu da sam ja otac devojДҚice koju je podvodio!
snippet.description:
Gost emisije вҖңBez ustruДҚavanjaвҖқ bio je advokat i narodni poslanik SPS-a u SkupЕЎtini Srbije Toma Fila koji nas je opet iznenadio neobjavljenim ДҚinjenicama vezanim za hapЕЎenje i izruДҚenje HaЕЎkom Tribunalu nekadaЕЎnjeg Predsednika Srbije Slobodana MiloЕЎeviДҮa. Ugledni advokat se osvrnuo i na seriju вҖңPorodicaвҖқ koja se nedavno prikazala na RTS-u i dao svoje miЕЎljenje da li je serija trebala biti snimljena ili ne. Govorio je o netaДҚnim dogaД‘ajima koji su prikazani u seriji, kakvi su zaista bili ДҚlanovi porodice MiloЕЎeviДҮ, koje uloge su imali akteri dogaД‘aja koji su bili prisutni u vili вҖңMirвҖқ na Dedinju. Da li je glavni motiv izruДҚenja bio novac ili neЕЎto drugo, da li je bilo nuД‘enja mita, koje sve navode i natpise iz medija smo mogli da vidimo poslednjih meseci otkriva branilac Slobodana MiloЕЎeviДҮa. O samom HaЕЎkom Tribunalu, sudijama, procesu, advokat je bez ustruДҚavanja govorio, ali i u koga se i zbog ДҚega razoДҚarao. Toma Fila je otvoreno govorio i zbog ДҚega se prikljuДҚio SPS-u, iako kako kaЕҫe nikada nije bio simpatizer politike koju je vodio Slobodan MiloЕЎeviДҮ. Kao narodni poslanik komentarisao je i narativ koji se koristi u SkupЕЎtini Srbije, o menjanju Ustava koji predstoji, kao i o usvajanju Zakona o istopolnim zajednicama. Komentarisao je i afere silovanja koje okupiraju javnost, ali i sluДҚaj вҖңPalmaвҖқ, kao i mnoge druge aktuelnosti.

snippet.title: Oko magazin: Palma i Marinika - biti ili ne biti
snippet.description:
Da li se politiДҚar u Jagodini bavi podvoД‘enjem Еҫena ili se ДҚak i na ovakvim temama pravi politiДҚki rijaliti

Dragan MarkoviДҮ Palma i Marinika TepiДҮ su osobe o kojima se najviЕЎe govori proteklih sedam dana u Srbiji. Sve je poДҚelo od njenih optuЕҫbi za podvoД‘enje i pedofiliju u Jagodini. Dragan MarkoviДҮ tvrdi da u ovom sluДҚaju nema ni svedoka ni Еҫrtve, veДҮ se od svega pravi politiДҚki rijaliti. Marinika TepiДҮ juДҚe je dala izjavu u policiji u Jagodini i rekla da ima joЕЎ 7 svedoka koji bi mogli da svedoДҚe protiv Dragana MarkoviДҮa Palme, ali da neДҮe da otkrije njihov identitet dok ne dobiju zaЕЎtitu.

1959. Fidel Kastro je predvodio KomunistiДҚku revoluciju na Kubi a njegov mlaД‘i brat Raul bio je jedan od komandanata. 62 godine kasnije, 89-godiЕЎnji Raul Kastro povlaДҚi se sa ДҚela KomunistiДҚke partije Kube. Kakva ДҮe da bude Kuba bez prezimena Kastro i da li Kuba od leviДҚarske inspiracije postaje zemlja na putu tranzicije ka kapitalizmu?

Urednik emisije: Gorislav PapiДҮ
Label and copyright: RTS

snippet.title: Persona non grata: ЕҪarko KoraДҮ, Milan ДҶulibrk i Vladimir GajiДҮ
snippet.description:
Od Arkanovih tigrova do jagodinskog age. Kako je nastao i ЕЎta je postao Dragan MarkoviДҮ Palma? O naДҚinu vladanja, govora i ponaЕЎanja koje godinama gradi, od milostinje za sirotinju do bunga bunga Еҫurki za bogatu gospodu. Da li je Palma postao fenomen srpske politike?

O ДҚoveku koji se ovih dana nalazi u srcu skandala i optuЕҫbi za pedofiliju govore psiholog ЕҪarko KoraДҮ, novinar Milan ДҶulibrk i advokat Vladimir GajiДҮ.

snippet.description:

Hvala horu "ДҢarolija" ЕЎto su otpevali najllepЕЎe na svetu.

Artwork: Djoxa Designs - @_djoxa_

tekst:

bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


sedim nemam plan iz sata u sat
cekam samo kad ce proci dan

al onda cujem glas to je mali pas
nije tigar ali je bas gas

ooo blenta kada gleda me
ooo na osmeh tera me
ooo ooo
presladak je
pisa na uglu svakom

trcimo po keju
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu 
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


i kada stanem u zutu lokvu poludim
posle hrane je svuda sranje po kuci

krevet zapisan govna pun je stan
mali je al sere kilogram

napolju me blam dok govna sakupljam

ooo pa onda sapom mazi me
ooo ooo

snippet.title: LukiДҮ: Prijava 393 Еҫene veДҮi dokaz porobljene Jagodine od svega ЕЎto kaЕҫe TepiДҮ
snippet.description:
Novinarka Biljana LukiДҮ ocenila je u Novom danu da je kriviДҚna prijava koju su u Jagodini podnele 393 Еҫene "veДҮi dokaz porobljene Jagodine od svega ЕЎto su rekli Marinika i svedok". Istakla je da Jagodina nije usamljeni sluДҚaj. "Svaki taj ЕЎerif u malom mestu u Srbiji se isto tako ponaЕЎa", naglasila je ona.

Novinarka Biljana LukiДҮ ocenila je u Novom danu da je kriviДҚna prijava koju su u Jagodini podnele 393 Еҫene "veДҮi dokaz porobljene Jagodine od svega ЕЎto su rekli Marinika i svedok". Istakla je da Jagodina nije usamljeni sluДҚaj. "Svaki taj ЕЎerif u malom mestu u Srbiji se isto tako ponaЕЎa", naglasila je ona.

snippet.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs. Manchester City: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Manchester City picked up a decisive 2-1 win in the first leg of the UEFA semi final against Paris Saint-Germain. 

PSG came out firing in the first half and converted one of their many chances into a goal. Marquinhos scored in the 15вҖҷ to give PSG the lead. PSG kept the pressure on in the first half and finished with 9 shots on goal. 

In the second half PSG was content to sit back and defend the one goal lead. Manchester City took advantage and notched two goals both from set pieces. 
De Bruyne scored in the 64' when he tried to play the ball to the far post off of a free kick and instead found the back of the bet. Then Mahrez put the English side ahead in the 71' when he found the hole in the PSG wall off of a free kick right outside the box. 

Manchester City was able to maintain that one goal lead and will head back home with a huge advantage on aggregate. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on Paramount+:
https://www.paramountplus.com/shows/uefa-champions-league/

#UCL #UEFA #ChampionsLeague #PSG #ManCity #ManchesterCity #ParisSaintGermain

snippet.title: Game Recap: Nuggets 110, Clippers 104
snippet.description: The Nuggets defeated the Clippers, 110-104. Nikola Jokic led the way for the Nuggets with 30 points, 14 rebounds and seven assists, while Michael Porter Jr. added 25 points, seven rebounds and five assists in the victory. Kawhi Leonard tallied 16 points, five rebounds and six assists for the Clippers in his return from injury, while Rajon Rondo added a season-high 18 points (8-12 FG), along with five rebounds and five assists in the losing effort. The Nuggets improve to 43-21 on the season, while the Clippers fall to 43-22.

Kawhi Leonard tallied 16 points, five rebounds and six assists for the Clippers in his return from injury, while Rajon Rondo added a season-high 18 points (8-12 FG), along with five rebounds and five assists in the losing effort. The Nuggets improve to 43-21 on the season, while the Clippers fall to 43-22.

snippet.title: Dosije - Ubistvo nadomak Koceljeve | PRVA
snippet.description:
U selu Gradojevic nadomak Koceljeve u noДҮi izmeД‘u 13. i 14.juna 2000. godine dogodilo se trostruko ubistvo porodice MiloЕЎeviДҮ. Surovu tragediju na svu sreДҮu preЕҫiveo je najmlaД‘i ДҚlan, sin i unuk nastradalih, koji je zloДҚin prijavio policiji. Od tog trenutka kreДҮe trka s vremenom.


Е abaДҚka policija privodi sve za koje je iole postojala i najmanja sumnja da su poДҚinioci ovog gnusnog zlodela. Posle nekoliko nedelja u prostorijama MUP-a naЕЎla se i ekipa koja je i te kako poznata istraЕҫnim organima, oni ne samo da su osumnjiДҚeni za ovaj zloДҚin veДҮ iza sebe kriju joЕЎ neke mraДҚne tajne. Е ta je zapravo istina i da li su muЕЎkarci koji su privedeni zaista krivi za ovo trostruko ubistvo i da li je to u stvari jedini zloДҚin koji nose na duЕЎi?



Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub

Posetite naЕЎ sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
MoЕҫete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
MoЕҫete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

#PRVA

snippet.title: TepiДҮ: Naravno da imam joЕЎ svedoka o podvoД‘enju u Jagodini
snippet.description:
Potpredsednica Stranke slobode i pravde Marinika TepiДҮ izjavila je da ima viЕЎe svedoka da je predsednik Jedinstvene Srbije Dragan MarkoviДҮ Palma podvodio maloletnice i Еҫene u Jagodini. "Ne bih sebi dozvolila da rizikujem sa jednim iskazom i sa tako velikom temom koja bi sruЕЎila svaku vladu, naravno da imam viЕЎe svedoka", rekla je TepiДҮ, i u Novom danu proДҚitala joЕЎ jedno svedoДҚenje.

РҡРҫ СҳРө СғРәСҖР°Рҫ СғРҪРёС„РҫСҖРјСғ? РҡРҫ СӣРө РҝРҫРұРөРҙРёСӮРё РҪР° СӮР°РәРјРёСҮРөСҡСғ? РҹРҫРіР»РөРҙР°СҳСӮРө Сғ РҫРІРҫСҳ СҒРөСҖРёСҳРё!

snippet.title: BAO Disney Pixar Full Short Film Official Promos | Incredibles 2 Bonus (2018) Animation Adventure HD
snippet.description:
Follow US on Social Media!
в–ә Instagram: https://instagram.com/aniboxtraileraccess/
в–ә Twitter: https://twitter.com/AniBox_Access

Bao is a 2018 American computer-animated short film written and directed by Domee Shi and produced by Pixar Animation Studios. It was released with Incredibles 2 on June 15, 2018. The film is about an aging and lonely Chinese-Canadian mother, suffering from empty nest syndrome, who receives an unexpected second chance at motherhood when she makes a steamed bun (baozi) that comes to life. The film won the Oscar for the Best Animated Short Film at the 91st Academy Awards.

A Chinese-Canadian woman suffering from empty nest syndrome gets a second shot at motherhood when one of her handmade dumplings comes alive.

В© 2018 The Walt Disney Company. | All Rights Reserved.

snippet.description:

snippet.title: SAT: Е ta da radite ako nemate katalizator ili DPF?
snippet.description:
Od ovog leta poДҚinje primena stroЕҫih pravila na tehniДҚkim pregledima, a najveДҮi problem biДҮe merenje kvaliteta izduvnih gasova, jer mnogi automobili upravo zbog tih merenja neДҮe viЕЎe moДҮi da budu registrovani.

Emisija SAT detaljno ДҮe govoriti o katalizatorima i DPF filterima koje bi polovnjaci stari i do 20 godina morali da imaju, a mnogi ne znaju da li ih poseduju i da li su ispravni. U emisiji otkrivaju kako da proverite da li je na vaЕЎem automobilu neki od tih filtera izvaД‘en i ako jeste, ЕЎta da uradite kako biste proЕЎli tehniДҚki pregled.

Ljubitelji automobila uЕҫivaДҮe u uporednom testu BMW-a "serije 1" protiv audija "A3", a u rubrici "Predstavljamo" testirali su novu daДҚiju "logan".

Urednik i voditelj je Mladen AlviroviДҮ.

Repriza emisije je petkom u 11.00 na Drugom programu.


Copyright: Radio televizija Srbije
 
Zabranjeno svako kopiranje video i/ili audio snimaka i postavljanje na druge kanale!

snippet.title: Emanet 170. BГ¶lГјm | Legacy Episode 170
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: FIBA EuroBasket 2022 Draw
snippet.description:
The 41st edition of the FIBA EuroBasket will take place in four countries, with Czech Republic, Georgia, Germany and Italy co-hosting Europe's flagship event in 2022.

The Group Phase of the event will be staged in Prague (CZE), Tbilisi (GEO), Cologne (GER) and Milan (ITA), with each of the cities hosting one group each.

The top four teams from each group will advance to the Final Phase in Germany's capital Berlin, where the European champions will be crowned in September 2022.

FIBA EuroBasket 2022 will take place from September 1-18, 2022.

snippet.title: РҹР РһРЎРўРһ Рё РһР РҳР“РҳРқРҗРӣР¬РқРһ - РҡР°Рә РҡСҖР°СҒРёСӮСҢ РҜР№СҶР° РҪР° РҹР°СҒС…Сғ 2021
snippet.description:
РҡР°Рә РәСҖР°СҒРёСӮСҢ РҝР°СҒС…Р°Р»СҢРҪСӢРө СҸР№СҶР°: РҪРөСҒРәРҫР»СҢРәРҫ РҪРҫРІСӢС… Рё РҫСҖРёРіРёРҪР°Р»СҢРҪСӢС… РёРҙРөР№
в¬ҮРҹРһР”Р РһР‘РқРһРЎРўРҳ РқРҳР–Р•в¬Ү

рҹ“ҚРЎРҫС…СҖР°РҪРёСӮРө РҪР° Pinterest: https://tinyurl.com/yu27nnf9
рҹ‘үРЎРҝР°СҒРёРұРҫ, СҮСӮРҫ СҒРјРҫСӮСҖРёСӮРө РҪР°СҲРё РІРёРҙРөРҫ! РқРө Р·Р°РұСӢРІР°Р№СӮРө СҒСӮР°РІРёСӮСҢ Р»Р°Р№РәРё, РҝРҫРҙРҝРёСҒСӢРІР°СӮСҢСҒСҸ Рё Р¶Р°СӮСҢ РҪР° РәРҫР»РҫРәРҫР»СҢСҮРёРә. 
рҹ”—РҹРҫРҙСҖРҫРұРҪРҫСҒСӮРё Рё РҙСҖСғРіРёРө РёРҪСӮРөСҖРөСҒРҪСӢРө РёРҙРөРё РІСӢ РҪР°Р№РҙРөСӮРө Р·РҙРөСҒСҢ: http://www.g8ozd.ru/6-idej-pashalniye-yaitsa/

*************************************
РҹР°СҒС…Р° - СҚСӮРҫ РҪРө СӮРҫР»СҢРәРҫ СҒРІРөСӮР»СӢР№ Рё РҫСҮРөРҪСҢ СҖР°РҙРҫСҒСӮРҪСӢР№ РҝСҖР°Р·РҙРҪРёРә, СҚСӮРҫ СӮР°РәР¶Рө РІСҖРөРјСҸ РҝСҖРҫСҸРІРёСӮСҢ СҒРІРҫСҺ РёРҪРҙРёРІРёРҙСғР°Р»СҢРҪРҫСҒСӮСҢ Рё СӮРІРҫСҖСҮРөСҒРәРёРө СҒРҝРҫСҒРҫРұРҪРҫСҒСӮРё. Р’РөРҙСҢ РәРҫРіРҙР° РөСүРө, РәР°Рә РҪРө РҪР° РҹР°СҒС…Сғ РјСӢ Р·Р°РҪРёРјР°РөРјСҒСҸ СғРәСҖР°СҲРөРҪРёРөРј СҸРёСҶ, РёС… СҖРҫСҒРҝРёСҒСҢСҺ, РҝРҫРҙРұРҫСҖРҫРј РёРҪСӮРөСҖРөСҒРҪСӢС… РҫСҖРёРіРёРҪР°Р»СҢРҪСӢС… РҪР°РәР»РөРөРә Рё СҸСҖРәРёС… РәСҖР°СҒРҫРә? РҡР°Р¶РҙР°СҸ С…РҫР·СҸР№РәР° С…РҫСҮРөСӮ, СҮСӮРҫРұСӢ РёРјРөРҪРҪРҫ РөРө РҝР°СҒС…Р°Р»СҢРҪР°СҸ РәРҫСҖР·РёРҪР° РұСӢР»Р° СҒР°РјРҫР№ РҪР°СҖСҸРҙРҪРҫР№. Рҳ СҒРөРіРҫРҙРҪСҸ РјСӢ РҝРҫРјРҫР¶РөРј СҚСӮРҫ Р¶РөР»Р°РҪРёРө РҫСҒСғСүРөСҒСӮРІРёСӮСҢ. РЎРөРіРҫРҙРҪСҸ РјСӢ РҝРҫРәР°Р¶РөРј 6 РҫСҖРёРіРёРҪР°Р»СҢРҪСӢС… РҙРҫРјР°СҲРҪРёС… СҒРҝРҫСҒРҫРұРҫРІ СҖР°Р·СғРәСҖР°СҒРёСӮСҢ СҸР№СҶР° РҪР° РҹР°СҒС…Сғ. Р“РҫСӮРҫРІСӢ? РўРҫРіРҙР° РҪР°СҮРҪРөРј!

If you want to continue thinking about black holes a tad more, you can do so by getting one of the many black hole related things the Kurzgesagt team made with love: 
https://bit.ly/3dRJj71

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sources-black-holes/

Our Video on Neutronstars: https://youtu.be/udFxKZRyQt4
Our Video on the Information Paradox: https://youtu.be/yWO-cvGETRQ

Black holes are the most powerful and extreme things in the universe and they are wildly weird and complicated. What would happen if you fell inside one and what are they really?

snippet.title: Man jumps feet-first into moving car through window to stop dangerous driver in Albania
snippet.description:
A man has jumped through the window of a moving car to stop an erratic and dangerous driver in the main square of Albania's capital, Tirana. The footage showed a damaged vehicle being dangerously driven in Skanderbeg Square as people tried to stop it. Police said the 32-year-old driver had previously crashed three other cars in other parts of the city. The video was captured by dozens of cameras set up in Skanderbeg Square to report on the general election in Albania

snippet.title: DЕҫep je ostao prazan, a Predejane se ne predaje
snippet.description:
HoДҮemo li u DЕҫep ili u Predejane?

Ovo pitanje uvek postavljamo posle pakovanja kofera, razmiЕЎljanja o tome da li smo neЕЎto zaboravili, gde su pasoЕЎi, da li su radovi negde na putu, jer putari uvek rade u sred letnje sezone, ustvari do ovog pitanja dolazimo kada shvatimo da smo na pola puta do mora. Ovo je poslednja priДҚa o pitanju hoДҮemo li u DЕҫep ili u Predajane.

snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
AranЕҫman: @jonezr
Mix i Master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @jovanradoviic
Directed by: GUH, @jovanradoviic
Video Edit & Post Production: @jovanradoviic
https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviicвҖӢвҖӢ

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

snippet.title: Emanet 169. BГ¶lГјm | Legacy Episode 169
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Emanet 168. BГ¶lГјm | Legacy Episode 168
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#BizGerГ§eДҹiz
#SehYam

snippet.title: ДҗOGANI - Lockdown - Official video + Lyrics
snippet.description:
izvrЕЎni producent: Дҗ. ДҗOGANI
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
рҹҺ§ BUY/LISTEN ON:
Deezer --- https://www.deezer.com/sr/album/220806082
Spotify  --- https://open.spotify.com/album/1WBQiJwSCkQejkNysoGnfU 
Tidal --- https://store.tidal.com/rs/album/179745531
Amazon --- https://www.amazon.com/Lock-Down-Explicit-Дҗogani/dp/B091V6715V/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=lockdown+Д‘ogani&qid=1618212461&s=dmusic&sr=1-1
ITunes --- https://music.apple.com/us/album/lock-down-single/1561828922
Napster  --- coming soon
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Follow ДҗOGANI: 

рҹ“І  Booking manager: +381 63 206 422 
рҹ“© djogani.djole@gmail.com

рҹ‘ү Fan page --- https://www.facebook.com/Djoganifans/вҖӢ 

рҹ‘ү Facebook --- https://www.facebook.com/djogani.grupaвҖӢ 
рҹ‘ү Instagram --- https://www.instagram.com/djoganivesnaвҖӢ 

Subscribe to Channel Дҗogani:  https://www.youtube.com/c/grupaДҗOGANIofficial
UkljuДҚi рҹ”” da dobijaЕЎ obaveЕЎtenja za sve nove pesme!
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom. 
First, can someone who's been vaccinated 
still spread the disease? 

Lockdown ko knockdown
Djogani is in the house
With a brand new sound
No money no, no business
Put your mask on 
and keep the distance
Lockdown nervous breakdown
Fucking virus is flying around
We gotta move, move
we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sedim kuДҮi cele noДҮi maskiran
Svetom vlada ДҚudna epidemija
ДҢekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda piЕЎe LOCK DOWN,
VidiЕЎ na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci ДҚini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru ДҚekamo
Da me grliЕЎ hoДҮu jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva
Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Jo, jo, jo, jo...
Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

SluЕЎaj malo doktore na vestima
Е ta ДҮe dalje biti baЕЎ me zanima
ДҢekaj, hani, hani, da proД‘u ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
JoЕЎ samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reДҚ
PuniДҚemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i BeДҚ.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je Дҗole Дҗogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je ЕЎto smo sami,
Ne moЕҫemo vani
Zato doД‘i meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaЕЎ mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zahvaljujemo se:
рҹҺө Antonu
рҹҺө Marku D.
рҹҺө ЕҪiki P.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ZABRANJENO je reupload-ovati na svoj liДҚni kanal zbog krЕЎenja autorskih prava i kvarenja zvuka i nepotrebnog gomilanja na YouTube-u! Svako kaДҚenje Video spota na YouTube, biДҮe prijavljeno YouTube administratorima. Sva autorska i izvoД‘aДҚka prava su zaЕЎtiДҮena.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: BALKAN INFO: Ajs Nigrutin - Nije bembara za Ajzaka, meni treba auto u kome mogu da prevozim daske!
snippet.description:
Link do cele emisije: https://youtu.be/gh2bac7dGAw

Zabranjeno je svako preuzimanje snimaka i objavljivanje na drugim YouTube kanalima. Svi duplikati ДҮe biti uklanjani u skladu sa YouTube pravilima. Iz ovoga ДҮe biti izuzeti samo oni koji dobiju specijalnu dozvolu od vlasnika autorskih prava.

Autorska prava: "BALKAN INFO - ZvaniДҚni kanal"
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLG5Qu54Q7gywaCeDs5etuQ

*************************************************************

Ako bismo prestali da budemo zavisni od korporacija koji kontroliЕЎu druЕЎtvene mreЕҫe, lakЕЎe bismo mogli da ЕЎirimo slobodnu reДҚ i naЕЎe emisije bi imale mnogo veДҮi domet.

Kako zajedno moЕҫemo da pobedimo u borbi za istinu? Instalirajte aplikaciju Telegram i pridruЕҫite nam se na https://t.me/tvbalkaninfo

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i Еҫele da pomognu rad naЕЎe produkcije to mogu uДҚiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. TrudiДҮemo se da ostanemo dosledni naЕЎoj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i ЕЎirenju istine bez cenzure.

PAYPAL - Donacije za naЕЎu produkciju
https://www.paypal.me/tvbalkaninfo/

PATREON - Donacije za naЕЎu produkciju
https://www.patreon.com/tvbalkaninfo/

BALKAN INFO - Druge moguДҮnosti za donacije
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/donacije/

*************************************************************

Rad naЕЎe produkcije moЕҫete podrЕҫati kupovinom majica, dukserica, ЕЎolja i drugih proizvoda koji uz moderan i elegantan dizajn promoviЕЎu vrednosti za koje se svi zajedno borimo.

BALKAN INFO - ZvaniДҚna online prodavnica
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/prodavnica/

TEESPRING - Online prodavnica (samo za inostranstvo)
https://teespring.com/stores/tvbalkaninfo/

*************************************************************

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne Еҫele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji poЕЎtuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji ДҚuvaju seДҮanje na naЕЎe slavne pretke.

https://www.youtube.com/naukaimisterijebalkan/

OLUJA PROMENA - NaЕЎ treДҮi kanal
https://www.youtube.com/olujapromena/

*************************************************************

NaЕЎ rad moЕҫete pratiti i na drugim druЕЎtvenim mreЕҫama:

BALKAN INFO - Facebook
https://www.facebook.com/tvbalkaninfo

BALKAN INFO - Instagram
